name: barscan-native
description: Capacitor native-app shell for Barscan. The web app itself (app.html, index.html) has no build step and deploys to GitHub Pages unchanged; this package.json exists only to scaffold and sync the iOS/Android native wrappers.

scripts.sync:android: npm run prepare-native && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run prepare-native && npx cap sync ios
